creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Assign the role of maintainer to haskell@ for these ports to make them easier to be updated for Haskell porters.  It is because the current maintainer does not seem to be active any more, implied by the timeouts received for recent PRs [1][2].

[1] http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/140041
[2] http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/142121

Fix: 

Replace MAINTAINER for haskell@FreeBSD.org for both ports.
